title: funckia nervosa
intro: Funckia nervosa, also known as Corydalis yanhusuo, is a type of flowering plant native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, specifically its ability to interact with the brain's opioid receptors, which can help alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Funckia nervosa include its use in treating various conditions such as anxiety, depression, insomnia, and chronic pain, as well as its potential to improve cognitive function and mood. Funckia nervosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas, which are often used to support mental health and well-being.
intro_study: According to "Frontiers in pharmacology", Funckia nervosa (also known as Rikkunshito) has been shown to significantly prolong median survival and improve body weight increase in patients with Stage III/IV pancreatic cancer and geriatric cachexia.
